SO
public class MerchantService : IMerchantService {
private readonly IMediator _mediator;
public async Task<Result> OnboardAsync(
OnboardMerchantCommand cmd) {
return await _mediator.Send(cmd);
}

About Me

Building the Future of Digital Finance

With over 6 years of experience, I architect and deliver enterprise-grade software that drives financial innovation across Africa.

I'm a Senior Software Engineer and Architect with deep expertise in building cloud-native enterprise applications for the banking and fintech sector.

My work spans the full engineering lifecycle — from requirements analysis and system design through to implementation, deployment, and ongoing optimization. I specialize in .NET, C#, ASP.NET Core, with a strong command of cloud infrastructure on Microsoft Azure.

I design systems using proven architectural patterns including Domain-Driven Design (DDD), CQRS, Clean Architecture, and Microservices, ensuring solutions are maintainable, scalable, and resilient under enterprise load.

Featured Projects

Enterprise Solutions

A selection of large-scale enterprise projects built for the banking and financial services sector.

Banking Platform

Merchant Onboarding Platform

A comprehensive digital onboarding solution for merchants, featuring automated KYC/KYB verification, document management, multi-tier approval workflows, and real-time status tracking across Nigerian banking channels.

Architecture

CQRSDDDClean ArchitectureAzure Service Bus
.NET 8AzureSQL ServerCQRSDDDMediatR
Payments

PAPSS Integration

Integration with the Pan-African Payment and Settlement System enabling seamless cross-border transactions across African markets, with real-time settlement, currency conversion, and compliance reporting.

Architecture

MicroservicesEvent-DrivenAPI GatewayIdempotency
.NET CoreREST APIsSQL ServerAzureMicroservices
Security

User Access Management

Centralized identity and access management system implementing fine-grained RBAC, attribute-based access control, audit trails, and compliance reporting across multiple banking applications.

Architecture

RBACJWTAudit LoggingMulti-tenant
.NETSQL ServerAzure ADJWTCQRS
Treasury

Treasury Portal

A sophisticated treasury management portal enabling real-time rate management, automated concession processing, multi-level approval workflows, and comprehensive treasury reporting for banking operations.

Architecture

Real-timeWorkflow EngineEvent Sourcing
.NET CoreSQL ServerSignalRAzureEntity Framework
Compliance

Fraud Reporting Portal

An intelligent fraud management system for real-time fraud detection, case management, investigation workflows, regulatory reporting, and analytics dashboards for compliance and risk teams.

Architecture

Event-DrivenAudit TrailReal-time Alerts
.NETSQL ServerAzureRedisBackground Services
Agency Banking

Agency Banking Platform

A full-featured agency banking solution managing agent lifecycle from onboarding through daily operations, including POS device management, transaction processing, settlement automation, and performance dashboards.

Experience

Career Journey

A timeline of roles where I've delivered impactful enterprise software across the banking and technology sectors.

Current2022 – PresentLagos, Nigeria

Wema Bank PLC

Software Engineer

  • Architect and deliver enterprise banking solutions serving millions of customers across Nigeria
  • Lead development of Merchant Onboarding Platform, PAPSS integration, and Agency Banking Platform
  • Design and implement microservices using .NET 8, Azure, CQRS, and DDD patterns
  • Drive cloud adoption strategy and Azure infrastructure design
  • Mentor junior engineers and conduct code reviews for quality assurance

Senior Software Engineer

  • Designed RESTful APIs consumed by mobile and web clients
  • Improved system performance through caching strategies with Redis

Senior Software Engineer

Architecture

System Design Principles

I design systems that are built to last — applying proven architectural patterns to deliver enterprise-grade, maintainable solutions.

Clean Architecture

Separation of concerns with Domain, Application, Infrastructure, and Presentation layers — ensuring independent testability and maintainability.

Presentation
Application
Domain
Infrastructure

CQRS Pattern

Command and Query Responsibility Segregation using MediatR — read and write models are decoupled for performance and scalability.

Commands
Queries
Event Handlers
MediatR Pipeline

Domain-Driven Design

Bounded contexts, aggregates, domain events, and ubiquitous language — aligning software design with complex business domains.

Aggregates
Value Objects
Domain Events
Repositories

Microservices

Independently deployable services communicating via REST APIs and message queues, with service discovery and API gateway patterns.

API Gateway
Service Mesh
Event Bus
Service Registry

Azure Cloud Native

Leveraging Azure PaaS services: App Service, Azure Functions, Service Bus, Key Vault, AKS, and Azure Monitor for observability.

App Service
Service Bus
Key Vault
AKS
Monitor

CI/CD Pipeline

Automated build, test, and deployment pipelines using Azure DevOps and GitHub Actions — enabling zero-downtime continuous delivery.

Build
Unit Tests
Integration Tests
Deploy
Monitor
